DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100031815)

LAW AND MOTION 302, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE WHY THE FOREGOING STAY SHOULD NOT BE CONTINUED PENDING ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. THE COURT ASSUMES THAT THE ISSUE IS MOOT SINCE THE BOARD HAS NOT FILED AN ACCUSATION AND/OR PETITION TO REVOKE PROBATION AS TO THE DEMAND THAT DR. RODGERS SUBMIT A BIOLOGICAL SAMPLE ON JANUARY 23, 2017. AS A RESULT OF THE FAILURE TO SUBMIT A SAMPLE, THERE IS NO NEED FOR FURTHER PROCEEDINGS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR NO. 8189, EMAIL: CKAREN@SFTC.ORG

calendar.matters:
Order To Show Cause Re Why The Foregoing Stay Should Not Be Continued Pending Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-14-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. Order To Show Cause Re Why The Foregoing Stay Should Not Be Continued Pending Entry Of Judgment is taken off calendar. The Court assumes that the issue is moot since the Board has not filed an accusation and/or petition to revoke probation as to the demand that Dr. Rodgers submit a biological sample on January 23, 2017. As a result of the failure to submit a sample, there is no need for further proceedings. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
